name: promote
description: End-to-end product promotion strategy + content production in a single skill. v1.4.0 BREAKING : (1) Source-Truth Ledger — NEW phase P0.5 ingests the product itself (TOC for book, docs for SaaS, syllabus for course) into intake/product-content.md as ground truth for STRUCTURE+EXAMPLES claims ; (2) Quality Gate #7 enriched with 3 NEW sub-checks — #7.1 product grounding (PRODUCT_PROMOTION posts must trace ≥1 STRUCTURE/EXAMPLES claim), #7.2 structural reference match (chapter/module names hard-fail without STRUCTURE claim), #7.3 anecdote source ; (3) Single-Run Production — strategist produces the full configured window (default 90 days, --days N flag) in one run, no more outline status, no more separate content-batcher skill ; (4) Operator-consultations have new must_quote_from field ; (5) Atomization variants library extended to 15. 1 entry point exposed (promote-strategist) backed by 38 internal prompts incl. NEW product-content-ingester subagent.

promote_home.title: Campaigns directory
promote_home.description: Where promote artifacts (campaigns) are written. Resolution order: 1) $PROMOTE_HOME env var, 2) ./campaigns/ relative to cwd (default), 3) ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/campaigns/ fallback if cwd is not writable.
